data.title: Sino Grandness Proposes Settlement for Outstanding Bonds
data.description:
The latest update is out from Sino Grandness Food Industry Group Limited ( (SG:T4B) ).

Sino Grandness Food Industry Group Limited has announced a proposed settlement regarding its outstanding bond obligations from 2011 and 2012. The settlement, facilitated by Goldman Sachs Investments Holdings (Asia) Limited, involves a payment of RMB 270 million over 3.5 years, which could impact the company’s financial stability and stakeholder interests.

More about Sino Grandness Food Industry Group Limited

Sino Grandness Food Industry Group Limited is a company incorporated in Singapore, operating in the food industry. The company focuses on producing and distributing food products, with a market emphasis on various bonds issued in previous years.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: S$22.99M

data.title: China Merchants Port Holdings Releases Shareholder’s Annual Report
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from China Merchants Port Holdings Co ( (HK:0144) ).

China Merchants Port Holdings Company Limited announced the release of the annual report by its substantial shareholder, China Merchants Port Group Co., Ltd., for the year ended December 31, 2024. The report, prepared under Chinese auditing standards, provides financial and operational insights into the group’s activities. Stakeholders are advised to exercise caution due to differences in accounting standards, which may affect the interpretation of the financial data.

More about China Merchants Port Holdings Co

China Merchants Port Holdings Company Limited is a prominent player in the port industry, primarily engaged in the operation and management of ports and related services. The company focuses on expanding its market presence and enhancing its operational efficiency across its subsidiaries.

data.title: Tietoevry Rewards Key Employees with Treasury Shares
data.description:
An update from TietoEVRY ( (GB:0KG0) ) is now available.

Tietoevry Corporation has assigned 156,667 treasury shares to 516 key employees as part of its long-term incentive plans for the earnings period 2022-2024. This move, decided by the Board of Directors, is part of a broader repurchase program and aims to reward employees, reflecting the company’s commitment to its workforce and aligning with its strategic goals.

More about TietoEVRY

Tietoevry is a leading technology company with a strong Nordic heritage and global capabilities, focusing on cloud, data, and software services. It serves thousands of enterprise and public sector customers in around 90 countries, with an annual turnover of approximately EUR 3 billion. The company’s shares are listed on NASDAQ exchanges in Helsinki and Stockholm, as well as on Oslo Børs.

data.title: Nexus AG Announces Change in Voting Rights
data.description:
NEXUS AG ( (DE:NXU) ) has shared an announcement.

Nexus AG, based in Donaueschingen, Germany, has announced a change in voting rights involving The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. The notification indicates a decrease in the percentage of voting rights attached to shares from 3.55% to 2.97%, while the percentage through instruments increased from 0.43% to 1.01%, maintaining a total of 3.98%. This adjustment in voting rights could impact Nexus AG’s shareholder dynamics and influence future corporate decisions.

data.title: Yoshiharu Global Co. Reports Strong Q4 Revenue Growth
data.description:
An update from Yoshiharu Global Co. Class A ( (YOSH) ) is now available.

On April 2, 2025, Yoshiharu Global Co. announced its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ending December 31, 2024, highlighting a 47% increase in fourth-quarter revenues to $3.7 million and a full-year revenue increase of 39% to $12.8 million. The company also regained compliance with Nasdaq’s stockholders’ equity requirement, following new financing commitments and debt restructuring. The company plans to expand domestically and internationally, with new locations in Southern California, Boston, Seattle, Montana, Paris, London, and South Korea, and aims to initiate franchise sales in 2025. Yoshiharu’s strategic growth initiatives include diversifying service channels and reducing labor costs through technology, despite challenges like increased input costs and consumer price sensitivity.

More about Yoshiharu Global Co. Class A

Yoshiharu Global Co. is a fast-growing restaurant operator specializing in Japanese ramen and rolls. Established in 2016, the company quickly gained recognition as a leading ramen restaurant in Southern California and has expanded its operations to Las Vegas, currently owning and operating 15 restaurants.

YTD Price Performance: 369.33%

Average Trading Volume: 122,362

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

data.title: Far East Hospitality Trust Announces Leadership Transition
data.description:
Far East Hospitality Trust ( (SG:Q5T) ) has shared an announcement.

Far East Hospitality Trust has announced a change in its board leadership, with Mr. Wee Kheng Jin retiring as Chairman on April 30, 2025, after over 13 years of service. He will be succeeded by Mr. Quek See Tiat, who brings extensive experience in accountancy, audit, and corporate governance. Under Mr. Wee’s leadership, the Trust achieved significant milestones, including improved corporate governance and strategic acquisitions. Mr. Quek aims to continue this trajectory of success and deliver long-term value to stakeholders.

More about Far East Hospitality Trust

Far East Hospitality Trust operates in the hospitality industry, focusing on real estate investment and business trusts in Singapore. It manages a portfolio that includes hotels and serviced residences, aiming to provide quality hospitality services and enhance shareholder value.

data.title: Noah Holdings Sets Record Date for Annual General Meeting
data.description:
Noah Holdings Ltd. Class A ( (HK:6686) ) has shared an announcement.

Noah Holdings Private Wealth and Asset Management Limited has announced the record date for determining shareholder eligibility to attend and vote at its upcoming annual general meeting. The record date is set for April 17, 2025, and shareholders must ensure their share transfers are lodged with the company’s Hong Kong share registrar by this date to participate. Holders of American Depositary Shares can instruct the depositary on voting matters but must exchange their ADSs for shares if they wish to attend and vote directly at the meeting.

More about Noah Holdings Ltd. Class A

Noah Holdings Private Wealth and Asset Management Limited is a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands, operating in Hong Kong. It specializes in private wealth and asset management services, focusing on providing financial solutions and investment opportunities to its clients.

data.title: Hadeland Elektro Secures NOK 27 Million Contract for Fornebubanen Project
data.description:
An update from Elop AS ( (DE:72G) ) is now available.

Hadeland Elektro, a part of the Nordic Infrastructure Group, has secured a subcontract with Malthe Winje for the electrical installation of six underground rectifier stations on the Fornebubanen project, valued at NOK 27 million, scheduled for completion between 2025 and 2026. This contract signifies a strategic move for ININ Group AS, enhancing its position in the Nordic infrastructure sector and potentially offering significant growth opportunities for its stakeholders.

More about Elop AS

ININ Group AS is a listed investment company focused on infrastructure and industry services niches in the Nordics. The company aims to create value through identifying profitable investment opportunities with potential for development, consolidation, and growth, working alongside platform companies to achieve sustainable growth and superior profitability.

data.title: CION Investment Corp to Announce Q1 2025 Results
data.description:
CION Investment Corp ( (CION) ) just unveiled an update.

CION Investment Corporation announced that it will release its financial results for the first quarter ended March 31, 2025, on May 8, 2025, before the markets open. The company will also hold an earnings conference call at 11:00 a.m. ET on the same day to discuss these results, with a webcast and recording available for those unable to attend the live call.

More about CION Investment Corp

CION Investment Corporation is a publicly listed business development company with approximately $1.9 billion in total assets as of December 31, 2024. The company focuses on generating current income and capital appreciation by primarily investing in senior secured loans to U.S. middle-market companies. CION is advised by CION Investment Management, LLC, a registered investment adviser and an affiliate of CION.
